body_txt: Such characters will generally be villains (or at least generally more often than tomboyish girls who happen to have contempt for males , perhaps partly because women diverging from gender norms is relatively more embraced), and represent an intersection of Politically Incorrect Villain and Sissy Villain . However, some portrayals may nevertheless be more sympathetic, and make him an intersection of Noble Bigot and Real Men Wear Pink . Can also be a deconstruction of Gay Best Friend , especially if that's a role he never asked for — maybe all those "hilariously catty" putdowns he's slinging around are more pointed than you thought they were. And does he maybe seem a bit overenthusiastic to make use of his honorary B-Word Privileges , or to detail exactly what he finds unappealing about women? This can also double as a deconstruction of the Straw Misogynist whose hatred of women is attributed to machismo (or a failure to live up to it) — in contrast the Effeminate Misogynist Guy often consider himself better than women precisely because he lives up to the standards he sets on them. A Sister Trope of He-Man Woman Hater . Compare/contrast with Female Misogynist (as a subset of Boomerang Bigot ), who have a similar issue, but the contradiction is more immediately obvious in that case, as opposed to an effeminate misogynistic guy who could instead have stereotypes about women that aren't the same as the gender stereotypes of the setting in which he's presented.
